title: Pending Snapshot Detection
summary: EVE detects unresolved committed work per branch, records durable skip resolutions, and surfaces pending ranges through MCP, API, and the UI.
userVisibleChange: Agents and users can see when committed work still needs a Snapshot or Skip, and skip decisions are recorded under .eve/skips without appearing in product-history timelines.

risks.title: Pending state relies on local cache for first-observation baselines; canonical resolution still comes from tracked snapshots and skips.

decisions.title: Keep skip records separate from Snapshots so reviewed non-product work resolves pending ranges without changing snapshot timelines, counts, changelogs, or search.
